mapper.sql: s.name AS target_name, s.cover_url, s.score, s.price_per_capita, s.currency, s.address, c.name AS city_name, a.name AS area_name, s.has_deal, s.open_now, s.tags
mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS target_id, FROM shop s LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id=s.city_id LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id=s.area_id WHERE s.id=#{targetId} AND s.region=#{region} AND s.is_deleted=FALSE AND s.status=1

SELECT p.id AS target_id,p.title AS target_name, (SELECT pi.url FROM post_image pi WHERE pi.post_id=p.id ORDER BY pi.sort_no,pi.id LIMIT 1) AS cover_url FROM post p WHERE p.id=#{targetId} AND p.region=#{region} AND p.audit_status=1 AND p.status=1 AND p.is_deleted=FALSE

SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.target_type, f.target_id, f.created_at, CASE WHEN f.target_type=2 THEN p.title ELSE s.name END AS target_name, CASE WHEN f.target_type=2 THEN (SELECT pi.url FROM post_image pi WHERE pi.post_id=p.id ORDER BY pi.sort_no,pi.id LIMIT 1) ELSE s.cover_url END AS cover_url, s.score,s.price_per_capita,s.currency,s.address,c.name AS city_name,a.name AS area_name,s.has_deal,s.open_now,s.tags FROM user_favorite f LEFT JOIN shop s ON f.target_type=1 AND s.id=f.target_id AND s.region=#{region} AND s.is_deleted=FALSE LEFT JOIN post p ON f.target_type=2 AND p.id=f.target_id AND p.region=#{region} AND p.audit_status=1 AND p.status=1 AND p.is_deleted=FALSE LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id=s.city_id LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id=s.area_id WHERE f.user_id=#{userId} AND f.target_type=#{targetType} AND f.target_id=#{targetId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND target_type=#{targetType} AND target_id=#{targetId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_favorite f LEFT JOIN shop s ON f.target_type=1 AND s.id=f.target_id AND s.region=#{region} AND s.is_deleted=FALSE LEFT JOIN post p ON f.target_type=2 AND p.id=f.target_id AND p.region=#{region} AND p.audit_status=1 AND p.status=1 AND p.is_deleted=FALSE WHERE f.user_id=#{userId} AND ((f.target_type=1 AND s.id IS NOT NULL) OR (f.target_type=2 AND p.id IS NOT NULL)) AND f.target_type=#{targetType}

SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.target_type, f.target_id, f.created_at, CASE WHEN f.target_type=2 THEN p.title ELSE s.name END AS target_name, CASE WHEN f.target_type=2 THEN (SELECT pi.url FROM post_image pi WHERE pi.post_id=p.id ORDER BY pi.sort_no,pi.id LIMIT 1) ELSE s.cover_url END AS cover_url, s.score,s.price_per_capita,s.currency,s.address,c.name AS city_name,a.name AS area_name,s.has_deal,s.open_now,s.tags FROM user_favorite f LEFT JOIN shop s ON f.target_type=1 AND s.id=f.target_id AND s.region=#{region} AND s.is_deleted=FALSE LEFT JOIN post p ON f.target_type=2 AND p.id=f.target_id AND p.region=#{region} AND p.audit_status=1 AND p.status=1 AND p.is_deleted=FALSE LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id=s.city_id LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id=s.area_id WHERE f.user_id=#{userId} AND ((f.target_type=1 AND s.id IS NOT NULL) OR (f.target_type=2 AND p.id IS NOT NULL)) AND f.target_type=#{targetType} ORDER BY f.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
